overall.description: Cinematic nighttime drone footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a flight through a historic New Orleans-inspired city. The camera ascends a grand courthouse facade with classical columns, then rises above the city to reveal gas-lit streets with wet cobblestones, before descending through narrow streets lined with balconies and storefronts.

agents.ego_description: rising vertically up the courthouse facade from entrance to roof

entered.detail: grand entrance with heavy wooden doors and warm lamplight
tall ionic columns flanking the courthouse entrance
stone inscription reading FIAT JUSTITIA above the entrance
SUPREME COURT carved into the stone facade near the roofline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at ground level before a grand courthouse entrance, then ascends steadily past massive stone columns and classical inscriptions. The facade is illuminated by a single warm entrance lamp against the dark night, revealing barred windows and carved stone details as the camera climbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of historic city district

events.description: rises above the courthouse roof revealing the illuminated cityscape below

agents.ego_description: flying forward over the city streets at moderate altitude

entered.detail: stone balustrade and roof structure of the courthouse
historic buildings with warm gas lighting visible across the district
gas street lamps casting warm pools of light on the streets below
wet reflective cobblestone streets glistening under the lamps

segments.scene_description: The camera crests the courthouse roof to reveal a sprawling historic city at night. Gas street lamps illuminate the wet cobblestone streets below, casting warm golden light against the dark blue night sky. The drone moves smoothly over the urban landscape, showing the grid of streets lined with trees and period architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with wrought iron balconies

events.description: descends from high aerial view to street level between buildings

agents.ego_description: flying between historic buildings while descending toward street level

entered.detail: ornate black wrought iron railings on building balconies
large vertical red billboard on the side of a brick building
dark canvas awning over a storefront entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera descends into the narrow canyon of a historic street, passing close to wrought iron balconies and under strings of decorative lights. A large red advertisement sign dominates one building wall. The wet cobblestones reflect the warm gas lamp light as the drone navigates between the closely packed structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone sidewalk with shopfronts and awnings

events.description: passes a pedestrian pushing a cart along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: flying low along the sidewalk past storefronts at nearly pedestrian height

notable_agents.action: pushing a wooden cart along the wet cobblestone sidewalk

entered.detail: red awning with white text reading GALLARD and SHOES
green striped awning over a saddlery shop
parked carriage on the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the camera glides along the wet cobblestone sidewalk past illuminated storefronts with prominent awnings. The drone passes a pedestrian pushing a cart and continues toward a horse-drawn carriage parked further down the street, with gas lamps providing the primary warm illumination in the narrow urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends a grand architectural facade before diving deep into the gas-lit corridors of a historic nighttime city. It begins at ground level before a courthouse entrance, climbing steadily past massive stone columns and carved inscriptions illuminated by a single warm lamp. As the camera crests the roof, the view expands to reveal a sprawling urban landscape of wet cobblestone streets and a grid of period architecture under a dark blue sky. The scene then shifts as the drone descends into a narrow street canyon, gliding past wrought iron balconies and a large red advertisement sign. Finally, the camera reaches street level to glide along the reflective sidewalks past illuminated storefronts, a pedestrian with a cart, and a parked horse-drawn carriage.
